operational_discipline: Be generous at candidate-identification. Be strict at admission. Optimize for governed admissibility, source fidelity, and boundary discipline — not claim volume.

tests.name: Standalone
tests.pass_condition: Retains full meaning outside its source paragraph without surrounding context

tests.name: Disputability
tests.pass_condition: A serious person can agree, challenge, or qualify it — genuinely contentful

tests.name: Governance
tests.pass_condition: Can be tagged, sourced, scoped, and audited under the GAQP schema

tests.name: Activation
tests.pass_condition: A system can determine when and where this claim matters

tests.name: Durability
tests.pass_condition: Remains useful beyond the moment of utterance

tests.name: Composability
tests.pass_condition: Can combine with other governed claims into larger judgment structures

tests.name: Non-Triviality
tests.pass_condition: Carries strategic, interpretive, factual, operational, or diagnostic weight
